title: Crunchy Shiitake Cookies
description: A sweet and crunchy cookie recipe featuring shiitake mushrooms. Perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together shiitake and sugar.
Add chopped nuts and mix until well combined.
Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Store in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
